author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: Imperial Automation umbrella cog for filtered RSS feeds, daily digests, Red Audio controls, queue quotas, persistent now-playing panels, and private listening rooms.
install_msg: Load with `[p]load imperialautomation`, then configure channels through `[p]ia`. This cog requires `feedparser` and integrates with Red Audio, Permissions, and optionally BotOps.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild configuration, Discord channel/message/voice-room IDs, feed sources and filtering settings, queue quota state, and persistent now-playing or listening-room mappings required for its automation features.
